recalls.Description: HALO is recalling its Magic Sleepsuit due to a potential choking hazard. The affected sleepsuits, identified by batch codes PO30592, PO30641, and PO30685, feature a shell and lining made of 100% cotton, with a polyester fill. These garments are equipped with double zippers along the front and are available in various colors and sizes. The sleepsuit is marked with 'HALO Magic Sleepsuit' on the front, and the batch codes along with 'Made in India' can be found on the sewn-in label inside the garment and the hang tag on the outside.
recalls.Title: HALO Magic Sleepsuit Recall Due to Choking Hazard Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact HALO Dream at 833-791-0420 from 9 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, via email at customerservice@sleepsuitrecall.com, or visit www.sleepsuitrecall.com. More details can also be found at www.halosleep.com under the 'Recalls' section.

recalls.Description:
Meijer is recalling various styles of one-piece footed sleepwear for children in sizes 12, 18, and 24 months. The sleepwear, branded as MCS and Lullaby Lane, features a variety of colors and patterns. The brand and size, along with 'Made in Thailand,' can be found printed on the neck of the garment. Each style has a specific number located on a sewn-in label, making identification straightforward for consumers. 

This recall affects multiple styles, including designs such as Heart, XOXO, Lucky Shamrock, and various animal prints. These items were sold at Meijer stores across several states and do not meet the required flammability standards for children's sleepwear, creating a potential burn hazard for young children.
recalls.Title: Meijer Recalls Lullaby Lane and MCS Children's Sleepwear Due to Fire Risk

recalls.Description:
Lola + The Boys has issued a recall for several styles of youth hooded clothing featuring drawstrings, which pose a serious risk of strangulation. The affected items include the Candy Heart Tie Dye set, Hoodie Unicorn Tutu set, Justice League Hero hoodie, Emoji Love hoodie, and Crystal Rainbow Rain hoodie. These garments were available in youth sizes 1 through 12 and have the brand name and size printed on the neck label.

The drawstrings can become entangled in objects, creating a significant hazard for children. This recall is in compliance with federal regulations regarding children's upper outerwear. Parents are urged to take immediate action to ensure the safety of their children.
recalls.Title: Lola + The Boys Recalls Youth Hooded Clothing with Drawstrings Due to Strangulation Risk

recalls.Description:
Bmrwtg is recalling its LED Tutu Skirts due to a serious risk of injury or death from battery ingestion. These skirts, available in various colors including pink, purple, yellow, red, blue, green, white, and black, feature lights powered by easily accessible CR2032 lithium coin batteries. Designed for children aged 2 to 8, these products do not comply with safety standards for items containing coin batteries, posing a significant danger to young users.

Parents and caregivers should take immediate action by stopping the use of the recalled skirts and safely removing the batteries. Additionally, Bmrwtg has provided instructions for obtaining a full refund, which includes cutting the skirt and sending a photo of the destroyed item to their designated email address. It is crucial to handle button cell and coin batteries responsibly, following local hazardous waste disposal guidelines.
recalls.Title: Bmrwtg LED Tutu Skirts Recalled Due to Battery Ingestion Hazard for Children
recalls.ConsumerContact: Contact Bmrwtg at bmrwtgrecall@outlook.com for assistance.

recalls.Description: Fieldsheer Apparel Technologies is recalling its heated socks, including models MWMS07, MWWS07, and MWMS05. These merino wool socks were available in various color combinations such as black/gray, gray/orange, gray/pink, and black/orange, and in sizes ranging from small to extra-large. Each pair includes two lithium-ion battery packs and a charging cable, with a battery pocket featuring either a slit or a zipper. Model MWMS05 is equipped with a battery pack (model number MW37V122) and a remote control for heat adjustment, while MWMS07 and MWWS07 come with Bluetooth-enabled battery packs (model number MW37V22-N). The model number is printed on the label on the back of the battery pack, and the Fieldsheer logo is displayed in orange on the front of the socks. It's crucial to handle the lithium-ion batteries properly to prevent fire hazards; do not dispose of them in regular trash or recycling bins. Contact your local hazardous waste collection center for proper disposal options.
recalls.Title: Fieldsheer Heated Socks Recalled Due to Burn Injury Risk

recalls.Description:
Innovative Designs has issued a recall for Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelets, specifically models 718508MCR and 718075MCR, available in pink and green. These bracelets feature the "MINECRAFT" logo on the packaging, with the model number located on the back. Each bracelet contains three pre-installed button cell batteries that pose a serious ingestion hazard to children.

The design of the battery compartment allows easy access for children, which violates safety standards for battery-operated toys. Ingesting a button cell or coin battery can lead to severe injuries, including internal chemical burns and potentially fatal outcomes. Parents are urged to take immediate action regarding these products.

recalls.Description:
The recall affects LED gloves, model ST01, which are available in small and medium sizes and feature various flashing modes. These gloves come with two pre-installed lithium coin batteries and an additional four batteries. The packaging displays "LED Gloves" on the upper left side and "Model ST01" on the bottom of the box. Due to safety concerns, these gloves pose a serious risk to children if the batteries are ingested.

The gloves do not comply with mandatory toy safety standards, as the battery compartment can be easily accessed by children. Furthermore, the spare batteries lack child-resistant packaging and necessary warnings, increasing the risk of serious injuries or even death from internal chemical burns if swallowed. Consumers are urged to take immediate action to ensure safety.

recalls.Description:
Marie-Chantal is recalling various styles of children's nightgowns, pajama sets, and robes due to a serious burn hazard. The affected nightgowns come in multiple designs, including prints featuring birds, bunnies, and stars, and are made from 100% organic or pima cotton. The pajama sets and robes also feature playful designs and are available in sizes for children aged 2 to 10 years. All garments are labeled with "Marie-Chantal" and RN number 103490 on a sewn-in seam label.

These products were sold at various retailers nationwide and online, and they do not meet federal flammability standards for children's sleepwear, which increases the risk of burn injuries or even death. Parents should take immediate action to ensure the safety of their children by removing these items from use.

recalls.metaDescription: Oso & Me recalls children's pajama sets due to burn hazards. Learn how to get a refund and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: The Vanilla Underground Minecraft TNT pajamas are a hooded one-piece design featuring a soft fabric adorned with Minecraft's Creepers and TNT. These pajamas include bright green cuffs at the wrists and ankles, a matching green zipper from the neck to the waist, and a hood. The garment is labeled with 'Minecraft' and includes branding from Mojang AB and Microsoft Corporation. Care instructions and fabric details are also provided on the labels, emphasizing the need to keep the pajamas away from fire.
recalls.Title: Recall of Vanilla Underground Minecraft TNT Pajamas Due to Fire Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Vanilla Underground at 800-918-5294 from 3 a.m. to 12:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email customercare@vanillaunderground.com, or visit https://www.vanillaunderground.com/ and click on 'Product Recall' in the footer, or go to https://www.vanillaunderground.com/pages/product-recall.

recalls.Description: Ekouaer is recalling their girl's nightgowns, which are composed of 95% cotton and 5% spandex, featuring a screen print on the chest. These nightgowns, available in short sleeves, come in sizes 110, 120, 130, 140, and 150 and were offered in 13 different colors including clear blue, lilac, light blue, light green, light gray, gray, pink, navy, light pink, purple, rose, white, and yellow. The nightgowns do not comply with federal flammability standards for children's sleepwear, creating a burn risk for young wearers.
recalls.Title: Ekouaer Girl's Nightgowns Recalled for Fire Hazard Due to Flammability Regulation Violation
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Ekouaer at 800-608-1432 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, excluding holidays. You can also email walshkelly15@gmail.com or visit https://ekouaer.com/pages/us-recall-nightgown-2023 for more details. Alternatively, go to https://ekouaer.com/ and click on 'Product Recall Information' at the top of the page.

recalls.Description: Stripe & Stare is recalling its children's nightgowns made from a blend of 95% modal and 5% spandex due to non-compliance with federal flammability standards. These long-sleeved nightgowns feature a ruffled collar, wrists, and hemline, and are available in sizes for children aged 1-10 years in the Morning Bliss Pink print. The neck label indicates the brand and size, while the inside seam label provides material and care instructions.

recalls.Description: Boot Royalty has announced a recall for the Men's Dark Brown Keaven WP Met Guard Work Boots, model SE4570, produced in July and August 2022. These slip-on leather work boots resemble cowboy boots and feature a metatarsal guard along with a steel toe for added foot protection. They are available in men's sizes 7 to 14 and are characterized by a tan and brown color scheme with decorative stitching. The boots display a red label on the outsole reading 'Justin' and have 'Steel Toe' and 'Met Guard' labels sewn into the side seams. A heat-transferred label inside the boot indicates the manufacturing date code of either 07/22 NH or 08/22 NH.
recalls.Title: Boot Royalty Issues Recall for Men's Leather Work Boots Due to Safety Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further details, consumers can reach out to Boot Royalty Company at 800-550-7327, available from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday. Alternatively, they can email customerservice@justinbrands.com or visit https://www.justinboots.com/ and select the 'Safety Recall' tab or go to www.justinboots.com/safetyrecall.

recalls.Description: H.H. Brown Shoe Company has announced a recall for the Redeemer DH 5379 Men's 11" Waterproof Metguard Comp Toe Ropers Work Boots. This recall affects boots with the manufacturing codes VCJJ22, VCJC23, VCJD23, and VCJF23. These pull-on boots feature a brown leather upper with a western design, square toe, one-inch heel, EVA midsole, and metatarsal guard. Key markings include 'Phantom Rider' and 'Non-Metallic Toe' on the outer side, along with a black label indicating 'Waterproof' and a white label inside displaying the model number, size, and manufacturing code. Only boots with the specified manufacturing codes are part of this recall.
recalls.Title: H.H. Brown Shoe Company Issues Recall for Redeemer DH 5379 Work Boots Due to Potential Injury Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to H.H. Brown Shoe Company at 800-441-4319 from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. Alternatively, they can email DH5379recall@hhbrown.com or visit https://www.doublehboots.com/safetyrecall for further details.

recalls.Description: A recall has been issued for several dress-up playsets from Litti City and Litti Pritti, along with Prextex slime eggs, due to violations of federal safety standards regarding phthalates and lead content. The Litti City premier doctor playset includes a white outfit and various accessories, while the teacher purse playset features a green purse with educational tools. The Litti Pritti handbag playset comes with a pink purse and makeup items. The Prextex slime eggs are packaged in a blue container and contain assorted colored slime and mini shaped beads.
recalls.Title: Recall of Litti City and Litti Pritti Dress-Up Playsets and Prextex Slime Eggs Due to Hazardous Phthalates and Lead Levels
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Perch at 888-359-4676 from 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, email playsets@realtimeresults.net, or visit www.recallrtr.com/playsets, https://www.perchhq.com/ and select 'Recall' at the top of the page, or go to https://www.prextex.com/ and click on 'Recall' for further details.
